title: Slice CLI Commands Implementation Plan
summary: Implementation plan for adding specgraph slice list/get/claim/complete CLI commands and renderers.
notes: Task/implementation plan with file map and checkbox steps; not an ADR (no decision/consequences), not a PRD (no user stories/acceptance criteria from user perspective), not a SPEC (no API/schema contract, just internal CLI task breakdown). Classified as DOC (implementation plan / supporting context).
